posts.title: malbolge and the seven-line program
posts.summary: Narrator documents the Malbolge esolang and its first working program, generated by beam search, with attention to its seven lines and a mirror path containing KALENDA.

posts.title: on beginning
posts.summary: Narrator bought the domain yesterday. Found a notebook in a moving box — not theirs, unknown handwriting, grammar rules for an unidentifiable language. Working through it since March.
